title: Simply Lock
description: SimplyLock - Enhance vannila experience with Chest Locker
body:
# SimplyLock
> Enhance Vannila Experience with Minecraft Chest Locker!

**PLEASE, READ THE TURTORIAL - THIS MOD USE SPECIAL MECHANIC TO WORKS!**
# Support
Platform: Mod(Forge,Fabric,Quilt), Datapack
Version : `1.14 - 1.20`

# Turtorial 
+ Requirement: **`Locker`**, `Book and Quill`
## Step 1: Crafting Locker  
+ Method 1: Normal Crafting Recipe
> Method 1 using Recipe Unlocker Advancement, it's not compatible with some mods like NERB ( Not Enough Recipe Book ). Try Method 2
	 
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/988uTB0b/images/e08e64201db8609212ba931adad3d5e9bb86f43e.gif)

+ Method 2: Drop crafting
> You must setup like the demo
> 
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/988uTB0b/images/ea69cca419734e623777603a97fdd13021a39a5d.gif)
## Step 2: Creating Password
 Write your Password into the `Book and Quill` 
  (**DON'T SIGN THE BOOK**)
## Step 3: Adding Lock into Chest
+ Place the `Book and Quill` to the FIRST slot of the chest. 
+ And then place the Locker on the top or next to the chest.  

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/988uTB0b/images/303d352d0b558b501381c8a752730f6d000599e9.gif)


## Note
> After locking the chest, ANY items with the same NAME  as the PASSWORD you entered in the Book can open the chest

To remove the lock, use the key to open the locked chest, and then remove the **Book** from the first slot. And then place the Locker on top or next to the chest again

The locked chest is unbreakable by the player, but an explosion from the TNT or Creeper can still break it. You would better water-log the chest

# Credits
Thanks to [Starwarrior25](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/starwarrior25/) for the [Locker and Datapack icons](https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/pixel-art-3---lock/).
